headline: Klaviyo (KVYO) to Benefit From Persistent Scaling of Autonomous Engagement Solutions
summary: Klaviyo Incorporated (NYSE:KVYO) is one of the 10 beaten-down technology stocks that could bounce back in 2026. On February 11, Terry Tillman at Truist reduced the price target on Klaviyo Incorporated (NYSE:KVYO) to $35 from $45 while reaffirming his Buy rating. The analyst informed investors that the company delivered strong fourth-quarter results, with growing enterprise […]
